title: ErrorState
description: Canonical UI error record consumed by every cross-screen error pipe (toast tray, recoverable-error panel, telemetry sink). Replaces ad-hoc per-screen error shapes. Errors are presentation only — they are part of state.ui.* and never enter saves, replays, or the canonical state hash.

code.description: Stable namespaced error id, e.g. 'ui.combat.invalidTarget'. Used for telemetry and de-duplication. Stable across releases.

severity.description: Display tier and dismissal policy. 'info' is recoverable and auto-dismissable; 'warn' surfaces an inline message; 'error' blocks the offending control; 'fatal' takes the user back to a known recovery screen.

messageKey.description: Localization id resolved against localization.schema.json. The renderer never embeds raw English strings.

messageParams.description: Parameter bag interpolated into the localized template. Keys are template names; values must be JSON-safe scalars or arrays of scalars.

recoverable.description: True when the user can retry from the same screen (e.g. retry a failed save). False for terminal errors that route to a recovery surface.

retryAction.description: Optional command re-dispatched when the user accepts the retry affordance. Same shape as a normal gameplay command; resolved through the command nonce gate.

raisedAtTick.description: Reducer tick at which the error was raised. Used to age out stale errors and to order them deterministically when more than one fires in the same frame.
